function.name: create_observations
function.arguments: {"observations":[{"content": "Yuki advanced the investigation into Hermes' latency issues.", "observation_type": "explicit", "confidence": 1.0}, {"content": "Yuki fixed the Bonsai $ORIGIN RPATH bug and the tool_choice \"any\" bug.", "observation_type": "explicit", "confidence": 1.0}, {"content": "Yuki increased Ollama's context length to 65k.", "observation_type": "explicit", "confidence": 1.0}, {"content": "Yuki set OLLAMA_GPU_OVERHEAD to 8GiB to coexist with Bonsai.", "observation_type": "explicit", "confidence": 1.0}, {"content": "Yuki observed that running qwen3.6:35b on CPU is slow, taking over 100 seconds per turn.", "observation_type": "explicit", "confidence": 1.0}, {"content": "Yuki wants to try the -ot flag in llama.cpp for CPU offloading of expert layers.", "observation_type": "explicit", "confidence": 1.0}, {"content": "Yuki lives in Kyoto.", "observation_type": "explicit", "confidence": 1.0}, {"content": "Yuki is a backend engineer.", "observation_type": "explicit", "confidence": 1.0}, {"content": "Yuki likes matcha and climbing.", "observation_type": "explicit", "confidence": 1.0}, {"content": "Yuki has a dog named Komugi.", "observation_type": "explicit", "confidence": 1.0}]}
